title: polypodium rigidum var. polyphyllum
intro: Polypodium rigidum var. polyphyllum, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a species of flowering plant in the polypodiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in tea, infusions, or topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
